properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's a voice that cries out in the silence Searching for a heart that will love Him Longing for a child that will give Him their all Give it all, He wants it all And there's a God that walks over the earth He's searching for a heart that is desperate And longing for a child That will give Him their all Give it all, He wants it all

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And He says love me, love me with your whole heart He wants it all today Serve me, serve me with your life now He wants it all today Bow down, let go of your idols He wants it all today He wants it all today He wants it all today He wants it all

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And there's a God that walks over the earth He's searching for a heart that is desperate Longing for a child that will give Him their all Give it all, He wants it all

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And He says love me, love me with your whole heart He wants it all today Serve me, serve me with your life now He wants it all today Bow down, let go of your idols He wants it all today He wants it all today He wants it all today

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: He wants all of you More of you, more of you He wants it all today, oh oh oh oh More of you, more of you He wants it all today, oh oh oh oh More of you, more of you He wants it all today, today, today He wants it all today He wants it all today So give it all

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: There's a voice that cries out in the silence Searching for a heart that will love him Longing for a child that will give him their all Give it all He wants it all
